info.name: Mobile APIs
info.description: Citizen-facing APIs for the mobile application. Protected requests use {{citizen_token}}.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Mobile citizen authentication flow. Copy OTPs from Mailtrap/email into citizen_otp.

request.description:
Purpose: Start citizen login and send OTP by email.
Required role: public
Required token: none
Expected response: standard GCMS API envelope with success, message, data, and meta when present.

exec: pm.test('status code is 200 or 201', function () { pm.expect([200, 201]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('response has success key', function () { var json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });
var json = pm.response.json();
function getPath(obj, path) { return path.split('.').reduce(function (current, key) { return current && current[key] !== undefined ? current[key] : undefined; }, obj); }

[["data.user_id","data.user.id"]].flat().some(function (path) { var value = getPath(json, path); if (value !== undefined && value !== null && value !== '') { pm.environment.set('citizen_user_id', value); return true; } return false; });

request.description:
Purpose: Verify citizen OTP and save citizen_token.
Required role: public
Required token: none
Expected response: standard GCMS API envelope with success, message, data, and meta when present.

exec: pm.test('status code is 200 or 201', function () { pm.expect([200, 201]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('response has success key', function () { var json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });
var json = pm.response.json();
function getPath(obj, path) { return path.split('.').reduce(function (current, key) { return current && current[key] !== undefined ? current[key] : undefined; }, obj); }

[["data.token"]].flat().some(function (path) { var value = getPath(json, path); if (value !== undefined && value !== null && value !== '') { pm.environment.set('citizen_token', value); return true; } return false; });

[["data.user.id","data.user_id"]].flat().some(function (path) { var value = getPath(json, path); if (value !== undefined && value !== null && value !== '') { pm.environment.set('citizen_user_id', value); return true; } return false; });

item.name: Citizen Complaints
item.description: Citizen complaint creation and viewing routes.

request.description:
Purpose: List complaints owned by the authenticated citizen.
Required role: citizen
Required token: {{citizen_token}}
Expected response: standard GCMS API envelope with success, message, data, and meta when present.

exec: pm.test('status code is 200 or 201', function () { pm.expect([200, 201]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('response has success key', function () { var json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });

request.description:
Purpose: Create a complaint with JSON body. Saves complaint_id and complaint_number when returned.
Required role: citizen
Required token: {{citizen_token}}
Expected response: standard GCMS API envelope with success, message, data, and meta when present.

body.raw:
{
    "title": "Street light is broken",
    "description": "The street light near my house has been broken for three days.",
    "department_id": "{{department_id}}",
    "category_id": "{{category_id}}",
    "priority_id": "{{priority_id}}",
    "latitude": 33.5138,
    "longitude": 36.2765,
    "address": "Damascus",
    "source": "mobile"
}

exec: pm.test('status code is 200 or 201', function () { pm.expect([200, 201]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('response has success key', function () { var json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });
var json = pm.response.json();
function getPath(obj, path) { return path.split('.').reduce(function (current, key) { return current && current[key] !== undefined ? current[key] : undefined; }, obj); }

[["data.id","data.complaint.id"]].flat().some(function (path) { var value = getPath(json, path); if (value !== undefined && value !== null && value !== '') { pm.environment.set('complaint_id', value); return true; } return false; });

[["data.complaint_number","data.complaint.complaint_number"]].flat().some(function (path) { var value = getPath(json, path); if (value !== undefined && value !== null && value !== '') { pm.environment.set('complaint_number', value); return true; } return false; });

Expected response: standard GCMS API envelope with success, message, data, and meta when present.

var json = pm.response.json();
function getPath(obj, path) { return path.split('.').reduce(function (current, key) { return current && current[key] !== undefined ? current[key] : undefined; }, obj); }

[["data.id","data.complaint.id"]].flat().some(function (path) { var value = getPath(json, path); if (value !== undefined && value !== null && value !== '') { pm.environment.set('complaint_id', value); return true; } return false; });

[["data.complaint_number","data.complaint.complaint_number"]].flat().some(function (path) { var value = getPath(json, path); if (value !== undefined && value !== null && value !== '') { pm.environment.set('complaint_number', value); return true; } return false; });

item.name: Offline Sync
item.description: Offline sync routes. Mobile clients generate client_uuid and can retry safely; sending the same client_uuid should not create a duplicate complaint.

request.description:
Purpose: Sync one offline complaint. Saves offline_submission_id and complaint details.
Required role: citizen
Required token: {{citizen_token}}
Expected response: standard GCMS API envelope with success, message, data, and meta when present.
client_uuid is generated by the mobile app and used for idempotency.

body.raw:
{
    "client_uuid": "{{offline_client_uuid}}",
    "title": "Offline complaint from mobile",
    "description": "This complaint was created while the user was offline.",
    "department_id": "{{department_id}}",
    "category_id": "{{category_id}}",
    "priority_id": "{{priority_id}}",
    "latitude": 33.5138,
    "longitude": 36.2765,
    "address": "Damascus",
    "created_offline_at": "2026-07-05T10:00:00Z",
    "source": "offline_sync"
}

exec: pm.test('status code is 200 or 201', function () { pm.expect([200, 201]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('response has success key', function () { var json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });
var json = pm.response.json();
function getPath(obj, path) { return path.split('.').reduce(function (current, key) { return current && current[key] !== undefined ? current[key] : undefined; }, obj); }

[["data.offline_submission.id"]].flat().some(function (path) { var value = getPath(json, path); if (value !== undefined && value !== null && value !== '') { pm.environment.set('offline_submission_id', value); return true; } return false; });

[["data.complaint.id"]].flat().some(function (path) { var value = getPath(json, path); if (value !== undefined && value !== null && value !== '') { pm.environment.set('complaint_id', value); return true; } return false; });

[["data.complaint.complaint_number"]].flat().some(function (path) { var value = getPath(json, path); if (value !== undefined && value !== null && value !== '') { pm.environment.set('complaint_number', value); return true; } return false; });

request.description:
Purpose: Retry the same client_uuid to verify idempotency. The response may include meta.idempotent=true.
Required role: citizen
Required token: {{citizen_token}}
Expected response: standard GCMS API envelope with success, message, data, and meta when present.

body.raw:
{
    "client_uuid": "{{offline_client_uuid}}",
    "title": "Offline complaint from mobile",
    "description": "This complaint was created while the user was offline.",
    "department_id": "{{department_id}}",
    "category_id": "{{category_id}}",
    "priority_id": "{{priority_id}}",
    "source": "offline_sync"
}

exec: pm.test('status code is 200 or 201', function () { pm.expect([200, 201]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('response has success key', function () { var json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });
var json = pm.response.json();
if (json.meta && json.meta.idempotent !== undefined) { pm.test('idempotent retry', function () { pm.expect(json.meta.idempotent).to.eql(true); }); }

item.name: Devices and Preferences
item.description: Device token and notification preference routes. Real device tokens come from the Firebase SDK; Postman uses fake_fcm_token only for backend testing.

request.description:
Purpose: Register or update a device token.
Required role: citizen
Required token: {{citizen_token}}
Expected response: standard GCMS API envelope with success, message, data, and meta when present.
Saves device_token_id when returned.

exec: pm.test('status code is 200 or 201', function () { pm.expect([200, 201]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('response has success key', function () { var json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });
var json = pm.response.json();
function getPath(obj, path) { return path.split('.').reduce(function (current, key) { return current && current[key] !== undefined ? current[key] : undefined; }, obj); }

[["data.device_token.id","data.id"]].flat().some(function (path) { var value = getPath(json, path); if (value !== undefined && value !== null && value !== '') { pm.environment.set('device_token_id', value); return true; } return false; });
